applyTo: "**/*.md"
description: "Documentation requirements and standards"
---

<!-- Based on/Inspired by: https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot/blob/main/instructions/documentation.instructions.md -->

# Documentation Guidelines

- Keep documentation concise and actionable: README, CONTRIBUTING, and API reference.
- Document public APIs, configuration options, and deployment steps.
- Use examples and short snippets in docs, but avoid embedding large amounts of implementation code.
- Keep docs in-sync with code; prefer companion example files for runnable samples.
